name: flowdash
description: FlowDash monorepo with a Spring Boot backend and React frontend

scripts.build:render: npm --prefix frontend run build && backend\mvnw.cmd -f backend/pom.xml -DskipTests package
scripts.smoke:mindvault: npm run build:render && npm --prefix frontend run smoke:mindvault
scripts.smoke:habits: npm run build:render && npm --prefix frontend run smoke:habits
